div1.entryFree: Bard, singer and soothsayer among the Celts: a b. of Ireland told me once, I should not live long after I saw Richmond, R3 IV, 2, 109. Singer in general: hearts, tongues, figures, scribes, bards, poets, cannot think, speak, cast, write, sing, number his love to Antony, Ant. III, 2, 16.
